name: Tesla
headline: Tesla ROTATION CARRY-FORWARD with INDEX-PRESENCE ISSUE — Tesla flagged for rotation but NOT PRESENT in fortune-500.json under any 'Tesla' entry (grep returns no matches). Carry-forward from May 13-15 cycle: NHTSA rearview camera recall (99.92% OTA remediated), Cybertruck wheel stud separation risk, NHTSA FSD probe escalation (3.2M vehicles), H-1B and WARN Act class actions, Tesla Optimus deployment in Fremont factory (sector humanoid robotics context). NO PROPOSAL WRITTEN: Tesla cannot receive a published-comparison change proposal until added to fortune-500.json. Recommending: (1) add Tesla as a first-baseline entry in fortune-500.json; (2) at that point conduct full first-baseline assessment with the May 13-16 evidence package. This is an INDEX-PRESENCE ISSUE for the assessor summary, not a score change.
indexPresence: ISSUE: Tesla is NOT present in fortune-500.json. grep -i 'tesla' returns no matches. Cannot generate a published-comparison change proposal. Flag for index addition.
